basis: Across past percentage-of-net deals in the $1–5K bucket at this venue, the percentage calc rarely beats the guarantee — the artist almost always walks with the contract guarantee ($2,500). Lock it in as a flat: same payout, no settlement-night recoup math. Confidence tier A (first-time).

Pure door deals at this venue lose money 93% of the time (avg net to venue −$1,007). Replace with a hybrid: artist gets a $500 floor regardless of walk-up, then 60% of the pool above an $1500 expense cap. Projected artist payout ~$1,987 at the cell-average gross of $4,420; venue stops eating expense overruns on slow nights. Confidence tier B (first-time).
